title: Moving Status Done tasks to the bottom of the SAME group. But still sort by date
excerpt:

posts.author: iamsampark (Sam Park)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello I can’t find a topic that specifically addresses this… please point me to it if possible.

I have many groups and I want to show all my Done items at the bottom of each group (I don’t want to create a done group or archive them). I want them to stay shown as done in the same group at the bottom.

I also want to still have the groups sort by date but show done items at the bottom of each group. Is this possible?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about a ‘double sort’?
